positive: A minimalist, abstract geometric design centered around a stylized cosmic wave colliding with a vibrant, luminous tropical palm leaf. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, neon magenta, electric teal, and brilliant white, giving it a vaporwave, modern tribal aesthetic. The lines must be crisp, clean, and highly contrasting, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Include subtle halftone patterns and radiating star bursts to enhance the energetic movement. Composition must be balanced and symmetrical, occupying the center space perfectly for a t-shirt print. Studio shot, ultra-high contrast, vector art quality, graphic design, symmetrical, bold silhouette.
negative: blurry, low quality, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, dirty, rough, noisy, messy
